title: Escalation Notification Trigger
content:
BG->>DB: SELECT overdue actions
role amps_background (RLS bypass for cross-tenant scan)
WHERE due_date < now() AND current_state NOT IN (closed, cancelled)

BG->>DB: SELECT escalation_rule
WHERE action_type=action.type
AND priority=action.priority
AND tenant_id=action.tenant_id

BG->>BG: Determine escalation tier
elapsed = now() - due_date
Match against tier thresholds (e.g. 24h=tier1, 72h=tier2)
alt auto-transition configured for this tier

BG->>DB: UPDATE action
SET current_state = escalation target
INSERT state_history (auto_escalation=true)

BG->>NS: (post-baseline) send notification
Phase 1 records audit event only
